## Goal
- Add useEventLogger argument to audit factory functions across repository (VAULT-17078)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Task is complete when change applied everywhere and project typechecks
- Follow existing API patterns in github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit

## Progress
### Done
- Defined EventLoggerConfig type with UseEventLogger bool field
- Located all NewAuditFormatter functions (7 instances total)

### In Progress
- Updating NewAuditFormatter signature to accept useEventLogger EventLoggerConfig parameter

### Blocked
- None

## Key Decisions
- Added EventLoggerConfig as separate parameter following existing FormatterConfig pattern
- Type definition placed in github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit (same location as BackendConfig, FormatterConfig)

## Next Steps
1. Update NewAuditFormatter signature to include useEventLogger parameter
2. View and update NewAuditFormatterWriter
3. Update internal/observability/event functions (NewAuditFormatterJSON, NewAuditFormatterJSONx)
4. Add useEventLogger to NoopAuditFactory in testhelpers/corehelpers
5. Add useEventLogger to NewAuditBroker in vault
6. Typecheck and fix any errors

## Critical Context
- EventLoggerConfig defined at: /vault/audit/agent.go (line 17)
- NewAuditFormatter locates at: /vault/audit/format.go:102
- Multiple variants of NewAuditFormatter exist across packages
- internal/observability/event package contains additional formatter implementations

## Relevant Files
- github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit/agent.go: EventLoggerConfig definition
- github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit/format.go: NewAuditFormatter and NewAuditFormatterWriter functions
- github.com/hashicorp/vault/internal/observability/event/node_formatter_audit_json.go: audit JSON formatter
- github.com/hashicorp/vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers: NoopAuditFactory
- github.com/hashicorp/vault/vault: NewAuditBroker
